comments: Approved. Verified commit b4ed24c via git show. Implementation changes exactly match the recorded execution result: bin/agent-protocol-init was added; install.sh and setup.sh were modified; adapters/AGENTS.md.tpl, adapters/CLAUDE_CODE_RULES.tpl, adapters/CURSOR_RULES.tpl, and adapters/TRAE_RULES.tpl were updated to point to documentation/AI_GUIDES/SYSTEM_PROMPT.md. No modification was made to src/mcp-server/src/index.ts, no legacy Python scripts were deleted, and artifact changes were limited to tasks/v0.6-m4-execution-result.json and tasks/v0.6-m4-result-review-packet.json, which match allowed_artifacts. The bootstrap script writes workflow/dispatch.json only into the external target directory and explicitly skips state generation when running inside this repository, so it does not statically write workflow state into the framework repository tracking index.
